infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to calculate the direction to the Kotel (Western Wall) from your current position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location to calculate the direction to the Kotel (Western Wall) from your current position.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: This app uses motion sensors to provide accurate compass readings and device orientation.
